narration_text: When panic hits, say this. Speaking truth out loud breaks the anxious loop and steadies your breathing. Repeat after me: God is with me. I will not fear. I give You my worry. Your peace guards my heart and mind. You are my refuge and my fortress. You restore my soul. You strengthen me for this moment. Your perfect love casts out fear. I cast my cares on You because You care for me. Nothing can separate me from Your love. Once again, peace is mine in Christ. Stay here as long as you need. You’re not failing. You’re being held.
